

# 

# **ESCORTING BUSINESS PLAN**

### 

## **FOREWORD**

I first published my ebook [*The Ins & Outs of Escorting*](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B019KONC5G) on Amazon back in 2015\. It was meant to be a primer for people who were interested in or considering giving sex work a try, and I just released an updated second edition in 2025\. 

The worksheets in this document are meant to be used alongside the text in my book, although you can certainly do the research about sex work independently and still use this workbook as a way to plan your entrance into the trade, if you’re so inclined.

![][image1]

### **Which services will you offer?**

| ⬜ GFE | ⬜ PSE | ⬜ FS | ⬜ BBBJ |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **⬜ Greek** | **⬜ Other** |  |  |

### **What are your hard limits?**

*These are your non-negotiables; everything on this list is off the table, no matter what kind of money is offered.*

---

---

---

---

---

---

### 

### **Are you fetish friendly?**

*Fetish is a word that covers a LOT of different things, so this might be hard to decide if you want to position yourself as being fetish-friendly. You can decide later on when you feel more confident and come back to this later.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Are you comfortable kissing and offering GFE?**

*There is no point in being dishonest here. You make the rules.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **How much will you charge for an hour of your time?**

*You can choose whatever you feel your time is worth, but if you’re not certain what would be considered reasonable in your geographic location, one thing you can do is browse the ads for your city and see what other women your age and with your traits are asking.*

---

---

---

---

---

---

### 

### **Will you offer shorter appointments?**

*Most women charge for an hour, a half hour, a fifteen minute “quick visit,” etc.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Will you offer overnight bookings?**

*It never hurts to list an overnight starting rate for anyone interested in booking a longer session, I get them pretty often\!*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Will you offer a discount to clients who book multiple hours?**

*Lots of guys ask for a reduced hourly rate if they are willing to book you for a multi-hour session. You’ll get more customers by doing this, but they are going to be the value-seeking, deal guys and that’s fine, if you’re okay with it.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Which methods of payment will you accept?**

*Accepting cash is something I recommend, but be careful to look closely at all the bills you’re given by new customers. Some guys will try to rip you off occasionally with fake bills.*

| ⬜ Cash | ⬜ Credit card | ⬜ Paypal | ⬜ Venmo |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **⬜ CashApp** | **⬜ Gift cards** | **⬜ Zelle** | **⬜ Other** |

### **Are you willing to consider trades or bartering?**

*Generally not something I would advertise, even if you’re open to it. Only worth doing if it saves you considerable money elsewhere, like having a mechanic willing to trade for services.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Will you charge extra to let customers record your sessions?**

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

---

![][image2]

### **Which days and hours will you be available?**

*I avoided breaking this up into blocks of hours to keep it general for now, but you can refine later.*

|  | MON | TUES | WED | THUR | FRI | SAT | SUN |
| :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **Mornings** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** |
| **Afternoon** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** |
| **Evening** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** |
| **Late** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** | **⬜** |

### 

### **Are you able to host?**

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Are you able to travel to clients?**

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **How far are you willing to drive to meet them?**

*This will vary wildly depending on where you live. I’m in an urban city with a large metropolitan area and generally advertise that I can do outcalls anywhere in my city or those immediately surrounding it.*

---

---

---

---

---

---

### 

### **Are you willing to meet clients at hotels?**

*This can be considered risky, especially with new clients or when something seems “off.” Follow your instincts and stay aware that this is how law enforcement tries to entrap providers to bust them.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Are you willing to meet at adult stores or arcades?**

*I live in a city that has lots of these places, but not everyone will. Adult “arcades” are generally stores that sell porn videos and sex toys that have a back area where you can “preview” adult movies, usually by inserting money into a machine. You are left alone to do what you want in there, and can bring someone with you, as long as you’re feeding money into the machine.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Will you allow car dates?**

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

---

![][image3]

### **Who is your ideal client?**

*You might not be sure about this answer just yet, but it won’t take seeing many clients before you figure it out.* 

---

---

---

---

---

---

### 

### **Do you have a preferred age range?**

*It’s quite common for providers to have age requirements like “only mature gentlemen over 30” in their ads.*

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **How personal are you comfortable getting with clients?**

---

---

---

---

---

---

---

**![][image4]**

### **How do you plan to screen new clients?**

---

---

---

---

---

---

### 

### **Will you require provider references to book new clients?**

*Some providers require at least one provider reference from new clients, some even refuse to see “newbies” who can’t provide any.* 

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

### 

### **Where might you suggest a meet and greet prior to booking an appointment?**

*Remember that these locations should be public, busy enough to be seen at all times, nearby where you are, and familiar to you.* 

---

---

---

---

---

---

### **Who will be your trusted contact?**

*This person has to be someone who knows what you are doing, isn’t going to give you grief over your choices, and who genuinely cares about your well-being. Choose with care.*

---

---

---

---

---

---

### **Will you carry any weapons or pepper spray?**

**⬜ YES   ⬜ NO**

---

### **Ad Body Text:**
